title: AAP loses 7 Rajya Sabha MPs in one blow, what now? | The Hindu Explains
description:
In a dramatic development, Aam Aadmi Party has suffered a major setback in the Rajya Sabha.

Senior leader Raghav Chadha, along with six other MPs, has announced a move to join the Bharatiya Janata Party, claiming it as a formal merger under constitutional provisions.

The shift reduces AAP’s strength in the Upper House from 10 MPs to just 3, a 70% drop overnight. Will the Arvind Kejriwal-led party survive this defection? We explain.

description: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge', directed by Aditya Dhar and starring Ranveer Singh, Sanjay Dutt, and R. Madhavan, has emerged as a global powerhouse, securing its spot as the third highest-grossing Indian film of all time with a worldwide gross of Rs. 1,766.12 crore. As of Day 37, the espionage epic is just a little over Rs. 111 crore away from shattering Allu Arjun’s 'Pushpa 2: The Rule' domestic net record and only Rs. 22 crore away from surpassing 'Baahubali 2: The Conclusion' globally. Despite being banned in Gulf countries and facing competition from Akshay Kumar’s 'Bhooth Bangla' and the ongoing IPL 2026, this U/A certified blockbuster continues its historic theatrical run.

description: KPMG is set to cut approximately 10% of its US audit partners after voluntary retirement schemes failed to yield desired results. The accounting giant, one of the Big Four, cited a need to align its partnership size with current business demands.

title: Patrick Mahomes $325 million valuation shock: Off-field move amid recovery
description: Patrick Mahomes, the Kansas City Chiefs’ quarterback, is focused on his recovery from his brutal injuries as his wife, Brittany Mahomes stands by his side through all the difficult times. While both Patrick Mahomes and his wife, Brittany Mahomes, have preferred to be private about the star player’s recovery, the high profile couple recently received an update worth a whopping $325 million.

title: Dianna Russini claim shocks: Alleged confession rocks Mike Vrabel saga
description: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, has publicly announced that he is taking some time off to seek counselling as the alleged affair rumors with Dianna Russini refuse to die down as new details emerge. Amid all the mess, it seems the situation has taken a turn for the worse as Dianna Russini’s husband and child have been dragged into the drama.

title: Lucknow: Boy sent for free Vedic education dies; 40+ injuries, 11 burn marks found on body
description: A horrific crime has shaken Kanpur as an 11-year-old student from a gurukul-style school was found murdered, bearing 11 cigarette burns and 43 severe injuries. The school operator and another suspect are in custody. Autopsy revealed internal injuries, with slides prepared amid suspicions of sexual assault. Authorities are ensuring swift justice.

title: After $6.25bn 'gift' to 'Trump Accounts', Michael & Susan Dell donate $750m
description: Michael and Susan Dell have pledged $750 million to the University of Texas at Austin for a new medical center and research campus. This significant donation will focus on integrating AI and advanced computing to improve patient care, research, and education. The project, expected to open by 2030, aims to enhance Austin's healthcare capabilities and advance medical innovation.
